AsType keyrole -> Gen (VerificationKey keyrole)

AsByronKey

-- This generator does not generate the deprecated double encoded plutus scripts
genValidScript :: ScriptLanguage lang -> Gen (Script lang)
genValidScript :: forall lang. ScriptLanguage lang -> Gen (Script lang)
genValidScript ScriptLanguage lang
SimpleScriptLanguage =
  SimpleScript -> Script lang
SimpleScript -> Script SimpleScript'
SimpleScript (SimpleScript -> Script lang)
-> GenT Identity SimpleScript -> GenT Identity (Script lang)
forall (f :: * -> *) a b. Functor f => (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
<$> GenT Identity SimpleScript
genSimpleScript
genValidScript (PlutusScriptLanguage PlutusScriptVersion lang
lang) =
  PlutusScriptVersion lang -> PlutusScript lang -> Script lang
forall lang.
IsPlutusScriptLanguage lang =>
PlutusScriptVersion lang -> PlutusScript lang -> Script lang
PlutusScript PlutusScriptVersion lang
lang (PlutusScript lang -> Script lang)
-> GenT Identity (PlutusScript lang) -> GenT Identity (Script lang)
forall (f :: * -> *) a b. Functor f => (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
<$> PlutusScriptVersion lang -> GenT Identity (PlutusScript lang)
forall lang. PlutusScriptVersion lang -> Gen (PlutusScript lang)
genValidPlutusScript PlutusScriptVersion lang
lang

genScript :: forall lang. ScriptLanguage lang -> Gen (Script lang)
genScript ScriptLanguage lang

  SimpleScript -> Script lang
SimpleScript -> Script SimpleScript'
SimpleScript (SimpleScript -> Script lang)
-> GenT Identity SimpleScript -> GenT Identity (Script lang)

<$> GenT Identity SimpleScript
genSimpleScript
genScript (PlutusScriptLanguage PlutusScriptVersion lang
lang) =

forall lang.
IsPlutusScriptLanguage lang =>
PlutusScriptVersion lang -> PlutusScript lang -> Script lang
PlutusScript PlutusScriptVersion lang
lang (PlutusScript lang -> Script lang)
-> GenT Identity (PlutusScript lang) -> GenT Identity (Script lang)

<$> PlutusScriptVersion lang -> GenT Identity (PlutusScript lang)

lang

ShelleyBasedEra era -> Gen (ScriptWitness WitCtxMint era)

sbe

-- | We include a @hasEmptyAnys@ parameter to control whether we allow empty
-- 'RequireAnyOf' constructors. This is because an empty 'RequireAnyOf',
-- same as a 'RequireMOf' with less than M elements, is not satisfiable.
-- In the function @satisfyScript@ in the "Test.Cardano.Api.TxBody" module,
-- we look for a set of witnesses that satisfy a script, and we can't do it
-- if the script consists of an empty 'RequireAnyOf' constructor.
-- Note that this is not the only way to make an unsatisfiable script,
-- but this is the one that affects the @satisfyScript@ function, because
-- it is only concerned with the witnesses, and not with the times.
genRandomSimpleScript :: Bool -> Gen SimpleScript
genRandomSimpleScript :: Bool -> GenT Identity SimpleScript
genRandomSimpleScript Bool
hasEmptyAnys =
  GenT Identity SimpleScript
genTerm
 where
  genTerm :: GenT Identity SimpleScript
genTerm = ([GenT Identity SimpleScript] -> GenT Identity SimpleScript)
-> [GenT Identity SimpleScript]
-> [GenT Identity SimpleScript]
-> GenT Identity SimpleScript
forall (m :: * -> *) a.
MonadGen m =>
([m a] -> m a) -> [m a] -> [m a] -> m a
Gen.recursive [GenT Identity SimpleScript] -> GenT Identity SimpleScript
forall (m :: * -> *) a. (HasCallStack, MonadGen m) => [m a] -> m a
Gen.choice [GenT Identity SimpleScript]
nonRecursive [GenT Identity SimpleScript]
recursive

  -- Non-recursive generators
  nonRecursive :: [GenT Identity SimpleScript]
nonRecursive =
    [ Hash PaymentKey -> SimpleScript
RequireSignature (Hash PaymentKey -> SimpleScript)
-> (VerificationKey PaymentKey -> Hash PaymentKey)
-> VerificationKey PaymentKey
-> SimpleScript
forall b c a. (b -> c) -> (a -> b) -> a -> c
. VerificationKey PaymentKey -> Hash PaymentKey
forall keyrole.
Key keyrole =>
VerificationKey keyrole -> Hash keyrole
verificationKeyHash (VerificationKey PaymentKey -> SimpleScript)
-> GenT Identity (VerificationKey PaymentKey)
-> GenT Identity SimpleScript
forall (f :: * -> *) a b. Functor f => (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
<$> AsType PaymentKey -> GenT Identity (VerificationKey PaymentKey)
forall keyrole.
(HasTypeProxy keyrole, Key keyrole) =>
AsType keyrole -> Gen (VerificationKey keyrole)
genVerificationKey AsType PaymentKey
AsPaymentKey
    , SlotNo -> SimpleScript
RequireTimeBefore (SlotNo -> SimpleScript)
-> GenT Identity SlotNo -> GenT Identity SimpleScript
forall (f :: * -> *) a b. Functor f => (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
<$> GenT Identity SlotNo
genSlotNo
    , SlotNo -> SimpleScript
RequireTimeAfter (SlotNo -> SimpleScript)
-> GenT Identity SlotNo -> GenT Identity SimpleScript
forall (f :: * -> *) a b. Functor f => (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
<$> GenT Identity SlotNo
genSlotNo
    ]

  recursive :: [GenT Identity SimpleScript]
recursive =
    [ [SimpleScript] -> SimpleScript
RequireAllOf ([SimpleScript] -> SimpleScript)

10) GenT Identity SimpleScript
genTerm

-- | 'genPlutusScript' will generate the deprecated double encoded
-- plutus scripts as well as valid plutus scripts.
genPlutusScript :: PlutusScriptVersion lang -> Gen (PlutusScript lang)
genPlutusScript :: forall lang. PlutusScriptVersion lang -> Gen (PlutusScript lang)
genPlutusScript PlutusScriptVersion lang
l =
  case PlutusScriptVersion lang
l of
    PlutusScriptVersion lang
PlutusScriptV1 -> do
      PlutusScript _ s <- Gen (Script PlutusScriptV1)
genPlutusV1Script
      return s
    PlutusScriptVersion lang
PlutusScriptV2 -> do
      PlutusScript _ s <- Gen (Script PlutusScriptV2)
genPlutusV2Script
      return s
    PlutusScriptVersion lang
PlutusScriptV3 -> do
      PlutusScript _ s <- Gen (Script PlutusScriptV3)
genPlutusV3Script
      return s
    PlutusScriptVersion lang
PlutusScriptV4 -> do
      PlutusScript _ s <- Gen (Script PlutusScriptV4)
genPlutusV4Script
      return s

genValidPlutusScript :: PlutusScriptVersion lang -> Gen (PlutusScript lang)
genValidPlutusScript :: forall lang. PlutusScriptVersion lang -> Gen (PlutusScript lang)
genValidPlutusScript PlutusScriptVersion lang
l =
  case PlutusScriptVersion lang
l of
    PlutusScriptVersion lang
PlutusScriptV1 -> do
      PlutusScript _ s <- Gen (Script PlutusScriptV1)
genValidPlutusV1Script
      return s
    PlutusScriptVersion lang
PlutusScriptV2 -> do
      PlutusScript _ s <- Gen (Script PlutusScriptV2)
genValidPlutusV2Script
      return s
    PlutusScriptVersion lang
PlutusScriptV3 -> do
      PlutusScript _ s <- Gen (Script PlutusScriptV3)
genValidPlutusV3Script
      return s
    PlutusScriptVersion lang
PlutusScriptV4 -> do
      PlutusScript _ s <- Gen (Script PlutusScriptV4)
genValidPlutusV4Script
      return s

genPlutusV1Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV1)
genPlutusV1Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV1)
genPlutusV1Script = do
  v1Script <- [ByteString] -> GenT Identity ByteString
forall (f :: * -> *) (m :: * -> *) a.
(HasCallStack, Foldable f, MonadGen m) =>
f a -> m a
Gen.element [ByteString
v1Loop2024PlutusScriptHexDoubleEncoded, ByteString
v1Loop2024PlutusScriptHex]
  let v1ScriptBytes = ByteString -> ByteString
Base16.decodeLenient ByteString
v1Script
  return . PlutusScript PlutusScriptV1 . PlutusScriptSerialised $ SBS.toShort v1ScriptBytes

genValidPlutusV1Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV1)
genValidPlutusV1Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV1)
genValidPlutusV1Script = do
  v1Script <- [ByteString] -> GenT Identity ByteString
forall (f :: * -> *) (m :: * -> *) a.
(HasCallStack, Foldable f, MonadGen m) =>
f a -> m a
Gen.element [ByteString
v1Loop2024PlutusScriptHex]
  let v1ScriptBytes = ByteString -> ByteString
Base16.decodeLenient ByteString
v1Script
  return . PlutusScript PlutusScriptV1 . PlutusScriptSerialised $ SBS.toShort v1ScriptBytes

genPlutusV2Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV2)
genPlutusV2Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV2)
genPlutusV2Script = do
  v2Script <- [ByteString] -> GenT Identity ByteString
forall (f :: * -> *) (m :: * -> *) a.
(HasCallStack, Foldable f, MonadGen m) =>
f a -> m a
Gen.element [ByteString
v2EcdsaLoopPlutusScriptHexDoubleEncoded, ByteString
v2EcdsaLoopPlutusScriptHex]
  let v2ScriptBytes = ByteString -> ByteString
Base16.decodeLenient ByteString
v2Script
  return . PlutusScript PlutusScriptV2 . PlutusScriptSerialised $ SBS.toShort v2ScriptBytes

genValidPlutusV2Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV2)
genValidPlutusV2Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV2)
genValidPlutusV2Script = do
  v2Script <- [ByteString] -> GenT Identity ByteString
forall (f :: * -> *) (m :: * -> *) a.
(HasCallStack, Foldable f, MonadGen m) =>
f a -> m a
Gen.element [ByteString
v2EcdsaLoopPlutusScriptHex]
  let v2ScriptBytes = ByteString -> ByteString
Base16.decodeLenient ByteString
v2Script
  return . PlutusScript PlutusScriptV2 . PlutusScriptSerialised $ SBS.toShort v2ScriptBytes

genPlutusV3Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV3)
genPlutusV3Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV3)
genPlutusV3Script = do
  v3AlwaysSucceedsPlutusScriptHex <-
    [ByteString] -> GenT Identity ByteString
forall (f :: * -> *) (m :: * -> *) a.
(HasCallStack, Foldable f, MonadGen m) =>
f a -> m a
Gen.element [ByteString
v3AlwaysSucceedsPlutusScriptDoubleEncoded, ByteString
v3AlwaysSucceedsPlutusScript]
  let v3ScriptBytes = ByteString -> ByteString
Base16.decodeLenient ByteString
v3AlwaysSucceedsPlutusScriptHex
  return . PlutusScript PlutusScriptV3 . PlutusScriptSerialised $ SBS.toShort v3ScriptBytes

genPlutusV4Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV4)
genPlutusV4Script = do
  v3AlwaysSucceedsPlutusScriptHex <-
    [ByteString] -> GenT Identity ByteString
forall (f :: * -> *) (m :: * -> *) a.
(HasCallStack, Foldable f, MonadGen m) =>
f a -> m a
Gen.element [ByteString
v3AlwaysSucceedsPlutusScriptDoubleEncoded, ByteString
v3AlwaysSucceedsPlutusScript]
  let v3ScriptBytes = ByteString -> ByteString
Base16.decodeLenient ByteString
v3AlwaysSucceedsPlutusScriptHex
  return . PlutusScript PlutusScriptV4 . PlutusScriptSerialised $ SBS.toShort v3ScriptBytes

genValidPlutusV3Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV3)
genValidPlutusV3Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV3)
genValidPlutusV3Script = do
  v3AlwaysSucceedsPlutusScriptHex <-
    [ByteString] -> GenT Identity ByteString
forall (f :: * -> *) (m :: * -> *) a.
(HasCallStack, Foldable f, MonadGen m) =>
f a -> m a
Gen.element [ByteString
v3AlwaysSucceedsPlutusScript]
  let v3ScriptBytes = ByteString -> ByteString
Base16.decodeLenient ByteString
v3AlwaysSucceedsPlutusScriptHex
  return . PlutusScript PlutusScriptV3 . PlutusScriptSerialised $ SBS.toShort v3ScriptBytes

-- TODO: This is not generating v4 scripts.
genValidPlutusV4Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV4)
genValidPlutusV4Script :: Gen (Script PlutusScriptV4)
genValidPlutusV4Script = do
  v3AlwaysSucceedsPlutusScriptHex <-
    [ByteString] -> GenT Identity ByteString

genScriptHash :: Gen ScriptHash
genScriptHash :: Gen ScriptHash

  ScriptInAnyLang _ script <- Gen ScriptInAnyLang

  txInsCollateral <- genTxInsCollateral era
  txInsReference <- genTxInsReference sbe
  txOuts <- Gen.list (Range.constant 1 10) (genTxOutTxContext sbe)
  txTotalCollateral <- genTxTotalCollateral era
  txReturnCollateral <- genTxReturnCollateral sbe
  txFee <- genTxFee sbe
  txValidityLowerBound <- genTxValidityLowerBound era
  txValidityUpperBound <- genTxValidityUpperBound sbe
  txMetadata <- genTxMetadataInEra era
  txAuxScripts <- genTxAuxScripts sbe
  let txExtraKeyWits = TxExtraKeyWitnesses era
forall era. TxExtraKeyWitnesses era
TxExtraKeyWitnessesNone -- TODO: Alonzo era: Generate witness key hashes

    BuildTxWith <$> forEraInEon era (pure Nothing) (Gen.maybe . genValidProtocolParameters)
  txWithdrawals <- genTxWithdrawals era
  txCertificates <- genTxCertificates era
  txUpdateProposal <- genTxUpdateProposal era
  txMintValue <- genTxMintValue era
  txScriptValidity <- genTxScriptValidity era
  txProposalProcedures <- genMaybeFeaturedInEra genProposals era
  txVotingProcedures <- genMaybeFeaturedInEra genVotingProcedures era
  txCurrentTreasuryValue <- genMaybeFeaturedInEra (Gen.maybe . genCurrentTreasuryValue) era
  txTreasuryDonation <- genMaybeFeaturedInEra genTreasuryDonation era
  pure $
    TxBodyContent
      { Api.txIns
      , Api.txInsCollateral

-- | Generate a 'Featured' for the given 'CardanoEra' with the provided generator.
genFeaturedInEra
  :: ()
  => Alternative f
  => eon era
  -> f a
  -> f (Featured eon era a)

genByronKeyWitness :: Gen (KeyWitness ByronEra)
genByronKeyWitness :: GenT Identity (KeyWitness ByronEra)
genByronKeyWitness = do
  pmId <- Gen ProtocolMagicId
genProtocolMagicId
  txinWitness <- genVKWitness pmId
  return $ ByronKeyWitness txinWitness

  AnyPlutusScriptVersion lang <- genAnyPlutusScriptVersion
  PlutusScript plutusScriptVersion' plutusScript <-
